examples: I went to the boat that was blown onto the beach in the shipwreck.
The only survivor of a shipwreck was washed up on a small, uninhabited island.
They narrowly escaped shipwreck in a storm in the North Sea.
Getting it wrong would mean a slipped schedule at best, or a shipwreck at worst.
And instead of shipwreck survivors, our real life players are small business owners and bankers.
